item.title: Sitemap
item.description: To navigate the documentation you can use the sidebar to the left.

item.title: CAPIBARA Collaboration Documentation
item.description: Welcome to the official documentation hub of the CAPIBARA Collaboration.

item.title: 16 Docker
item.description: Goal Learn how to use Docker to containerize your Python applications and ensure consistent environments across different machines.

item.title: 17 Local $\LaTeX$
item.description: Goal 02_setting_up_unix 03_command_line Prerequisites Basic collaboration account Installed environment Steps 1.

item.title: CodeCarbon
item.description: Goal You will learn how to track and visualize the carbon footprint of your Python code using the codecarbon package.

item.title: Code Editors and IDEs
item.description: Goal Learn about different code editors and integrated development environments (IDEs), and how to choose one that fits your needs.

item.title: Onboarding
item.description: Welcome to the CAPIBARA Collaboration! This onboarding guide will help you transition from application to becoming a skilled software engineer and researcher.

item.title: About
item.description: Structure Here’s to the structure of the CAPIBARA Collaboration: Parent organisation: The CAPIBARA Collaboration CAPIBARA-CRD: Cosmic Ray Detector Pathfinder.

item.title: Governance
item.description: Welcome to CAPIBARA’s governance docs! We’re a small (~10 student) informal research collaboration.

item.title: 00 Applying to Join
item.description: Goal Learn about the application process for joining the CAPIBARA Collaboration.
